title: Unbreakable Cereal Bowls Set of 8, 655ML Plastic Cereal Bowls, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Lightweight Reusable Bowl for Rice Noodle Soup Snack Salad Fruit
features: 8 PCS LARGE BOWLS SET: You will get 8 x 655ml cereal bowls with size 14.3cm in 8 different colour: Beige, Yellow, Blue, Green, Red, Dark Blue, Orange and Pink, the bright color bring you a fresh look, make your meals more colorful and appetizing with them!

LIGHTWEIGHT & UNBREAKABLE: The plastic bowls is very light and unbreakable. Because of its sturdiness, you don't have to worry about it possibly breaking if dropped, making it a good replacement for traditional plates. Perfect size is ideal for all family members, can be used as fruit bowls, cereal bowls, noodle bowls, soup bowls and rice bowls.

RELIABLE MATERIAL: Made of premium pp material, safe for use. Because reusable and durable design, our pasta bowl are ideal alternatives to traditional tableware. Not only perfect for everyday use, also a practical gift for friends and family on Mother's Day, Father's Day, birthdays, Christmas and Thanksgiving.

MULTI PURPOSE: These breakfast bowls set have perfect width and height, deep enough to accommodate various food items like fruits, salads, cereals, noodles and rice without spilling them out. Perfect for picnics, parties, and Camping.

DISHWASHER MICROWAVE SAFE: Our serving bowls are microwave safe so you can easily reheat food [ Note: The temperature resistance reaches up to 248 degrees Fahrenheit (120℃)], plus the dinnerware is very easy to clean, wash them with soap and hot water or place them into your dishwasher. The bowls easily stack inside of one another for saving space.
description: Product Description The BOWLS SET IDEAL FOR EVERYDAY USE INDOORS AND OUT. Looking for a way to add some heart to your home dining experience? Wanna host a cookout or would you just like to relax and enjoy your breakfast in the sun? Look no further than Dyserbuy Bowls Set! A quick and complete solution for your outdoor party. Versatile enough to be used every day and durable enough for use by the pool. This unbreakable dinnerware is just as chic as ceramics without the risk of breaking. MICROWAVE SAFE You can put the cereal bowls into the microwave oven to cook any food you want, convenient for everyday food heating. UNBREAKABLE DESIGN This bowls set is just as chic as a regular ceramic set, but durable, which are unbreakable no matter how many times it is dropped. REFRIGERATOR SAFE These bowls sets can withstand the low temperature of the refrigerator, help you store frozen foods for long-term meal planning. SMOOTH EDGE Smooth and round edges make it easier to hold and grip, giving you good touch, with perfect width and height. VERSATILE BOWLS 655ML is perfect for soup, cereals, ice cream, snacks, fruits, desserts or as a bowl for rice and pasta bowls SPACE SAVING Our bowls set can be stacked, you can stack them in your kitchen cabinet and disk rack to save space. MUITI-PURPOSE BOWLS SET PERFECT FOR EVERY OCCASION Ideal made for every occasion: daily use at BBQ, picnic, camping, parties, and everyday meals and drinks at home, school, the office, outdoor or traveling.
